1_missing_coordinates.denominator: all rows in each coordinate-bearing reference model
1_missing_coordinates.metric: rows where latitude OR longitude is null

2_placeholder_coordinates.denominator: all rows in each coordinate-bearing reference model
2_placeholder_coordinates.metric: rows matching a registered coordinate sentinel

3_duplicate_candidates.metric: City rows sharing a normalized name within 5km of each other

4_missing_aliases.metric: publishable City rows with zero CityAlias rows

8_unresolved_mappings.metric: staging rows not yet matched, and canonical entities with no source mapping

9_non_publishable_entities.denominator: all rows in each coordinate-bearing reference model
9_non_publishable_entities.metric: rows failing coordinate, placeholder, quarantine, or identity gates
9_non_publishable_entities.phase_gate: all candidate paths consume publishable rows only
9_non_publishable_entities.rows: use --details for the full reason-coded row list

out_of_range_coordinates.country_bbox_status: deferred: no approved country-bbox registry exists before Phase 3
out_of_range_coordinates.metric: non-null latitude outside [-90,90] or longitude outside [-180,180]
